text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with self-reflection. The modern, sleek glass room invites contemplation; it’s quiet and organized, yet distant. Walking into the R+D exhibit, I am surrounded by the energy of innovation, but I also feel exposed—as echoed in the text. There's a tension between the public setting and my private thoughts. I become keenly aware of the difference between how I intend to present myself and how others might perceive me, longing for connection in this space dedicated to progress and understanding.
